items.text: I woke up late and couldn't find my keys.

items.speaker: Ethan

items.text: I was swimming when you arrived.

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L08-02 - E2082 - Ethan - No, I've never ridden one.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L08-06 - E2086 - Ethan - I've never traveled by plane.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Mine isn't the best, but I like it.
items.translation: La mía no es la mejor, pero me gusta.

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Yes, but it hasn't shipped the package yet.
items.translation: Sí, pero aún no ha enviado el paquete.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L18-05 - E2185 - Emma - Yes, but it hasn't shipped the package yet.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I'm excited because my package arrived.
items.translation: Estoy emocionada porque llegó mi paquete.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L19-01 - E2191 - Emma - I'm excited because my package arrived.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L19-06 - E2196 - Ethan - At least it isn't disappointing.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: You shouldn't eat too many sugary snacks.
items.translation: No deberías comer demasiadas botanas azucaradas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-03 - E2223 - Mr. Carter - You shouldn't eat too many sugary snacks.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: And we shouldn't sleep too late.
items.translation: Y no deberíamos dormir demasiado tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-05 - E2225 - Emma - And we shouldn't sleep too late.mp3

items.speaker: Doctor
items.text: No, you don't have to, but avoid exercise.
items.translation: No, no tienes que hacerlo, pero evita el ejercicio.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-05 - E2235 - Doctor - No, you don't have to, but avoid exercise.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: We mustn't use our phones during the test.
items.translation: No debemos usar el teléfono durante el examen.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-04 - E2244 - Noah - We mustn't use our phones during the test.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Nothing bad. We'll learn from the experience.
items.translation: Nada malo. Aprenderemos de la experiencia.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L26-03 - E2263 - Mr. Carter - Nothing bad. We'll learn from the experience.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.translation: El público todavía no está aquí.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L29-04 - E2294 - Ethan - The audience isn't here yet.mp3

items.text: I can't believe I've done it.

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Not yet. I don't have much experience.

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I haven't had a job before.

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: You're welcome. We have one copy left.

items.text: I don't have it with me.

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: That's on me. I didn't check the list.

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: I don't think we need another meeting.

items.text: I can't believe this is happening.
